transcript: Every 30 minutes the seals must take a breath and she'll be waiting. This lesson is all about patience. The female cub seems to be taking the lesson seriously. One day she'll have her own young to feed. Her brother prefers making snowballs. At last, the waiting is over, but it's the wrong hole.
